query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM emotion_board_users) AS users,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM emotion_board_posts) AS posts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM emotion_board_likes) AS likes;
